title: brassica sabularia
intro: Brassica sabularia, a lesser-known member of the Brassica family, is a plant species that is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as Wild Cabbage or Sabularia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Brassica sabularia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a cooked vegetable.
